task.objective: Implement a Test Reliability Score feature that displays a gauge/meter showing 0-100 score representing overall test suite health
task.framework: Next.js 16 with App Router, Recharts, shadcn/ui

existing_patterns.pattern: Database queries use `getQueriesForOrg(organizationId)` wrapper pattern in lib/db.ts
API routes use `export const dynamic = "force-dynamic"` and auth check first
Components use `"use client"`, useState/useEffect for data fetching
Charts use Recharts with OKLCH colors (oklch(0.75 0.15 195) = cyan)
Cards use `glass-card glass-card-glow p-6` styling from globals.css

functional.requirement: Calculate reliability score using formula: (PassRate × 0.4) + ((1 - FlakyRate) × 0.3) + (DurationStability × 0.3)
Display score as a gauge/meter chart (0-100)
Show breakdown of contributing factors (pass rate, flakiness impact, performance impact)
Include historical trend of the score (last 7 days)
Support date range filtering (from/to query params)

non_functional.requirement: Query must complete within 500ms for typical data volumes
All data must be filtered by organization_id (multi-tenancy)

file.description: Add TypeScript interface for reliability score
Add database function to calculate reliability score
Create API endpoint for reliability score
Create gauge component for reliability score

constraints.avoid: Don't create new database tables - use existing test_results and test_executions tables
Don't add external dependencies beyond what's listed in package.json
Don't use localStorage or client-side storage
constraints.prefer: Follow existing patterns in lib/db.ts for query structure
Use OKLCH colors consistent with existing charts

output_format.code: Implement each file following the code snippets provided
output_format.explanation: Explain any deviations from the provided snippets
